title: ﻿3 Pack Flush Valve Seal for Ideal Standard,Black Rubber Flush Valve Seal & Clip,Replace of SV01967,SV93467,EV98167
features: 【Premium Materials】Our ideal standard flush valve seal is made of high-quality rubber, which has excellent softness, flexibility, and durability, providing better sealing. You can buy with confidence.
【Precision Compatibility】Suitable for Ideal Standard flush valves, including models SV01967, SV93467, EV98167, etc.Sealed tightly, effectively preventing water tank leakage.

﻿ 【Easy to Install】The installation is simple, just remove the old parts and replace them, no need to hire a plumber, ordinary users can easily and quickly complete the replacement, greatly saving your time and money.

【Universal Size】With a diameter of 70mm/2.76in, it meets the standard specifications and is perfectly compatible with most Ideal Standard toilet cisterns, without any adaptation concerns during installation.

【Products Include】You will receive 3pcs toilet seal, equipped with replacement clips. If the original parts are damaged during disassembly, they can be replaced directly, eliminating the worry of losing parts and making the replacement operation more worry free.
